llm_operation.reason: LayerNormalization (TF) and InstanceNorm3d (MS) are fundamentally different:前者对每个样本在指定axis上归一化，后者对每个通道的实例归一化；参数num_features/affine不兼容，且输入shape语义不匹配（LN无num_features参数，IN3d要求N,C,D,H,W且C=3但传入100）
